title: Define routable multi-hop DAO source
description: SCHC Rule 4 specifies link-local IPv6 RPL DAO while security/RPL specs require relays preserve the IPv6 source end-to-end. Routers cannot forward link-local sources across links. Define a routable origin-address model and update rules/vectors.
close_reason: Updated SCHC rule 4 + appendix/draft with routable ULA DAO source model for multi-hop forwarding and source preservation; vectors description aligned. Minimal spec+vector changes.
